CREATE TABLE test_table (id UUID, value String);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (generateUUIDv4(), 'Sample text'), (generateUUIDv4(), 'Another sample');
SELECT normalizeQuery('SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value = "Hello, world!"');
SELECT normalizeQuery('SELECT id, count(value) AS value_count FROM test_table GROUP BY value LIMIT 10');
SELECT normalizeQuery('SELECT *, (SELECT count(*) FROM test_table) AS total FROM test_table WHERE id = generateUUIDv4()');
SELECT normalizeQuery('SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE "%sample%")');
SELECT normalizeQuery('SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE "%text%")');
SELECT normalizeQuery('SELECT id, value FROM test_table AS t INNER JOIN test_table AS t2 ON t.id = t2.id WHERE t.value = "sample" AND t2.value = "Another sample"');

SELECT normalizeQuery('WITH query_1 AS (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = "Sample text"), query_2 AS (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = "Another sample") SELECT * FROM query_1 JOIN query_2 ON query_1.id = query_2.id');
SELECT normalizeQuery('SELECT id, arrayJoin([1, 2, 3, 4]) AS nums FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table LIMIT 5)');
